sql_array: CREATE TABLE fuzz_test (id UInt32, value Float64, date Date, nullable_value Nullable(Int32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fuzz_test WHERE value BETWEEN quantileTDigest(0.01)(value) AND quantileTDigest(0.99)(value);
SELECT id, quantileTDigest(0.5)(value) AS median_value FROM fuzz_test GROUP BY id HAVING median_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, value FROM fuzz_test WHERE value BETWEEN 2 AND 3.5 AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fuzz_test WHERE nullable_value IS NOT NULL) > 1;
SELECT id, quantileTDigest(0.95)(value) AS high_quantile FROM (SELECT id, value FROM fuzz_test WHERE id BETWEEN 1 AND 3) GROUP BY id HAVING high_quantile IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, value FROM fuzz_test WHERE (SELECT quantileTDigest(0.5)(value) FROM fuzz_test WHERE nullable_value IS NULL) BETWEEN 1 AND 2;
CREATE TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, quantileTDigest(0.5)(value) AS that_median FROM fuzz_test GROUP BY id;
SELECT DISTINCT id FROM fuzz_test WHERE NULLIF(value, 2.0) IS NULL;
SELECT quantileTDigest(0.5)(value) AS median_value, id FROM fuzz_test WHERE id BETWEEN (SELECT MIN(id) FROM fuzz_test) AND (SELECT MAX(id) FROM fuzz_test) ORDER BY median_value;
SET enable_mixed_case_identifiers = 1; SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fuzz_test WHERE value BETWEEN quantileTDigest(0.5)(value) AND NULLIF(quantileTDigest(0.9)(value), 0);
ALTER TABLE fuzz_test ADD COLUMN new_column String;
UPDATE fuzz_test SET new_column = 'test' WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM fuzz_test WHERE value IS NOT NULL);
